_comment: Auto-loaded by the Control Tower on startup. 'discoverHosts' imports MCPs dynamically from installed hosts (Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Cline, Claude Code) for the current OS — including each server's own env (e.g. NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED), so they connect exactly as the host runs them. Add static servers under 'servers' only if you want to hardcode one. Disable monitoring with env CT_MONITOR_MCP=off; point elsewhere with CT_MCP_CONFIG.
